subject: Re: Anthropic PM, Claude Code — next step
body:
Hi Jane,

Great chat yesterday. The team would like to move you to the next round — a 60-minute technical interview with two PMs and an engineer on the Claude Code team, focused on product sense + API platform strategy.

Next week works on our side; please share 2–3 windows in the next 5 business days. I'll send a calendar invite once we lock a time.

Thanks,
Priya
thread: [2026-05-27] 30-minute recruiter screen — went well per the user

asks: share 2–3 windows in the next 5 business days
